name: Tomatillo Salsa (Piedmont)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F. Loosely wrap garlic cloves in foil and roast for about 25 minutes, until very soft. Squeeze the garlic pulp from the skins into a small bowl and mash it to a paste.
2. In a medium bowl, combine all remaining ingredients. Add the garlic pulp and stir to blend.
